backlog.note: SHIMI is integrated, tested, and ready for benchmarking against vector-based baselines.

backlog.description: Implement advanced LLM/embedding backend for SHIMI memory (OpenAI, local LLM, or hybrid).
backlog.note: Universal backend and agent integration implemented. SHIMI and agents support advanced LLM/embedding backends.

backlog.description: Benchmark SHIMI memory in real-world agent workflows and compare with vector-based and RAG baselines.
Implement advanced event replay and debugging for rationale/mutation/self-healing events. Support distributed event sourcing and time-travel debugging.

Add/expand integration tests and update documentation for advanced ReasoningLoopUtility features (SCoT, LLM-driven explanation/repair, robust backtracking, feedback integration). Reference: capabilities/ReasoningLoopUtility.ts, tests/.

Implement real hybrid retrieval (vector + keyword), adaptive semantic chunking, LLM-based reranking, and feedback-driven improvement in RAGPipelineUtility. Integrate with embedding providers and semantic index. Emit events for all major actions.

Add end-to-end tests for orchestrated agent workflows (OrchestratorAgent/EnsembleAgent using RAGPipelineUtility, ReasoningLoopUtility, and FeedbackAgent). Ensure all events are emitted and aggregated correctly.
Ensure all describe(), health(), registry, and documentation are up to date after major changes to RAGPipelineUtility, ReasoningLoopUtility, FeedbackAgent, and OrchestratorAgent.
Implement real semantic chunking (embedding-based) in ChunkingUtility. Integrate with embedding providers and allow threshold configuration.
Implement real agentic chunking (task-driven, LLM/embedding-based) in ChunkingUtility. Support task-specific segmentation and metadata.
Add/expand tests for all chunking strategies in ChunkingUtility. Ensure robust coverage and edge cases.
Integrate ChunkingUtility into RAGPipelineUtility. Allow dynamic selection of chunking strategy and update docs/describe registry.
Implement real embedding-based reranker in RerankUtility. Integrate with embedding providers and scoring.
Implement real LLM-based reranker in RerankUtility. Integrate with LLM providers for scoring.
Implement real cross-encoder reranker in RerankUtility. Integrate with cross-encoder models for scoring.
Implement real MMR/diversity reranker in RerankUtility. Integrate with diversity scoring and deduplication.
Add/expand tests for all rerank strategies in RerankUtility. Ensure robust coverage and edge cases.
Integrate RerankUtility into RAGPipelineUtility. Allow dynamic selection of rerank strategy and update docs/describe registry.
Add/expand contract and integration tests for registry/describe/health compliance across all utilities, agents, and plugins.
Automate describe registry generation and CI enforcement for registry/describe/health compliance.
Review and update all agent and plugin describe() outputs for completeness and LLM/AI-friendliness.
Add/expand onboarding documentation for registry-driven, modular architecture and barrel file usage.
Integrate open-source LLM APIs for chunk scoring, semantic search, and memory summarization (e.g., HuggingFace, OpenRouter, local models).
Implement BM25 and DPR adapters for HybridRetrievalUtility (prefer Node.js or Python bridge, open source only).
Add/expand test coverage for ChunkingUtility, HybridRetrievalUtility, RerankUtility, and MemTree/SHIMI memory. Include edge cases and integration tests.
Document usage, configuration, and feature table entries for new context utilities in README.md, docs/, and onboarding materials.
